biological_rationale: Biomarker로서 가치는 multi-modal evidence가 있을 때 강해진다. RNA only는 transcript fluctuation, protein only는 dilution/PTM 영향. 4 layer 동시 support는 cross-modality robustness.
assay_reliability: All 4 layers measurable in our atlas (RNA bulk × 4 cohort, protein TMT × 2 cohort, scRNA × 10 cohort, serum DIA × 3 cohort).
justification_for_supplement: 4 evidence layers each contribute equally; sum normalized to [0,1]

biological_rationale: 진짜 stage-onset signal이라면 cohort 간 + layer 간 direction이 일치해야. RNA UP에서 Protein UP, multi-cohort consensus가 *true signal* 신호. Inversion(LTBP1 RNA UP × Serum DOWN 같은 case는 별도 carefully)
assay_reliability: DESeq2 sign + limma sign + scRNA trend slope sign + serum log2FC sign — direct binary direction.
justification_for_supplement: Cross-cohort + cross-layer voting; both contribute equally

biological_rationale: 4-Early-pattern framework의 핵심: Stage I-onset signal을 standard 4 template에 매칭. 'shape match'이 marker의 prerequisite (early-stage detection 가능 조건).
assay_reliability: Pearson ρ vs 4 template — robust shape correlation; LRT padj on stage effect.
justification_for_supplement: Required for early-stage relevance; high rho without effect size still concentrated to early window

biological_rationale: Cohort heterogeneity가 큰 신호는 *artifact* 위험 (LTBP1 case처럼 1 cohort가 끌어올린 평균). I² ≥ 50%면 random-effects meta가 0 근처로 수렴 — true sustained signal 부정.
assay_reliability: metafor REML + I² statistic; 잘 검증된 meta-analysis methodology.
justification_for_supplement: Higher I² → larger penalty; I² >= 70% receives full penalty

biological_rationale: Housekeeping (HK) genes는 stage-specific signal로 보일 수 있으나 *생물학적 baseline* 흔들림에 불과. 또 plasma high-abundance는 abundance 자체로 detection 가능 (≠ marker quality). 이 둘을 explicit penalize.
assay_reliability: HPA housekeeping list (Eisenberg 2013 / Hounkpe 2021) + Anderson 2002 plasma high-abundance reference. Public, curated.
justification_for_supplement: HK genes: full penalty -1.0; plasma top decile: -0.5; both: -1.0 capped

biological_rationale: Tissue → serum translation success가 PDAC marker의 진짜 가치. Tissue marker 중 *secreted + serum-detectable*이 임상 적용 가능. Direction concordance + serum AUC + detection robustness.
assay_reliability: DIA proteomics 3 cohort + signal peptide annotation (UniProt). 잘 검증된 features.
justification_for_supplement: Required for serum-deliverable marker; absent → 0 contribution

biological_rationale: RNA-only weak/artifact여도 protein/scRNA/serum이 강한 case (LTBP1처럼). 이런 case는 *RNA bulk artifact*에 가려진 진짜 신호일 수 있음. 작은 weight로 'multi-modal rescue' 인정.
assay_reliability: Computed from layer disagreement: RNA tier ARTIFACT/OTHER but other layers GOLD/SILVER 패턴.
justification_for_supplement: Weight intentionally small (0.05) — 신호이지 main contribution 아님
